headline: What Could Push JNJ Stock Higher From Here?
summary: While the market fixates on the STELARA patent cliff, the rest of the business is quietly accelerating. Excluding the legacy drug, Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) grew in double digits for the quarter. The Innovative Medicine segment absorbed a massive 920 basis point headwind from STELARA, yet still posted 7.4% growth. This is not a company treading water, but a portfolio already hitting its next stride.

headline: JNJ Raised the Bar: So Why Is the Stock Standing Still?
summary: Management raised the bar two months ago, but the stock just shrugged. Here’s why the market is waiting for proof, not promises.

headline: Medtronic (MDT) Stock Valuation Check After Mixed Recent Performance
summary: Medtronic stock snapshot after recent trading performance Medtronic (MDT) has drawn investor attention after a mixed stretch in its share price, with the stock roughly flat over the past day, up in the past month, yet lower over the past 3 months and year to date. Those moves come against the backdrop of a global medical device business generating US$36.4b in revenue and US$4.8b in net income, with operations spread broadly across cardiovascular, neuroscience, medical surgical and diabetes...

headline: Medtronic completes acquisition of Scientia Vascular, seamlessly integrating access and therapeutic portfolios for neurovascular care
summary: Medtronic plc (NYSE: MDT), a global leader in healthcare technology, today announced it has completed its acquisition of Scientia Vascular, a privately-held medical device company in Salt Lake City. The acquisition is valued at $550 million, subject to customary adjustments, with potential undisclosed earn-out and milestone payments post-acquisition.
